arts.ttl: It's easy to stick boot in to Spurs - Postecoglou
arts.sum: Tottenham head coach Ange Postecoglou says the criticism of his side is "really easy".

arts.ttl: Aston Villa predicted lineup vs Tottenham
arts.sum: An expectant Villa Park awaits on Sunday as Aston Villa take on Tottenham Hotspur in the fourth round of the FA Cup. There should be multiple fresh faces and big names in claret and blue this weekend, with Emery poised to hand debuts to several of Villa's winter arrivals.

arts.ttl: Tottenham signing overcame 'fishy' medical hitch that threatened career before transfer
arts.sum: ASTON VILLA vs TOTTENHAM: Adversity is nothing new for Spurs' latest recruit Kevin Danso, who has overcome various hurdles on his long-winding road back to the Premier League where previously played for Southampton

arts.ttl: Former Colchester Villa Youth player praised by Pep Guardiola after wonder goal
arts.sum: Spurs loanee Donley, who scored a remarkable 175 goals for Villa’s under-eights, gave Orient a surprise lead after 16 minutes of the fourth-round clash with a sensational 40-yard lob that hit the crossbar and bounced in off City goalkeeper Stefan Ortega. Orient boss Richie Wellens admitted it was a shame to see it go down as an Ortega own-goal after Donley's long-range strike hit the crossbar and bounced in off City's back-up goalkeeper.

arts.ttl: 'I'm waiting': Unai Emery shares what he's now expecting Tottenham to do when Aston Villa host them tomorrow
arts.sum: Aston Villa play host to Tottenham Hotspur in the FA Cup on Sunday hoping to reach the fifth round of the competition at the Lilywhites’...

arts.ttl: Yves Bissouma decision made as £40m man returns: Tottenham predicted starting XI v Aston Villa
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur will look to bounce back from their disappointing League Cup elimination when they head to Aston Villa for their FA Cup fourth-round clash...

arts.ttl: “They understood…” – La Liga defender explains Aston Villa snub
arts.sum: Aston Villa were linked with several La Liga players during the winter transfer window, and concrete efforts were made for two defenders: Loic Bade and Juan Foyth. However, neither player budged, and as such, they will remain at Sevilla and Villarreal respectively for the remainder of the season. Bade was Aston Villa’s first choice, but […] The post “They understood…” – La Liga defender explains Aston Villa snub appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Team News: Aston Villa vs. Tottenham Hotspur injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Sunday's FA Cup clash between Aston Villa and Tottenham Hotspur.

arts.ttl: West Brom fans deliver Will Lankshear verdict after Tottenham gem makes Baggies debut against Sheffield Wednesday
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur academy graduate Will Lankshear made his debut for loan club West Bromwich Albion on Saturday. Tottenham sent Will Lankshear out on loan in January following...

arts.ttl: How Marcus Rashford declined from Man United's golden boy to an Old Trafford outcast - and why Aston Villa could be the perfect place to get his mojo back: THE SHARPE END
arts.sum: THE SHARPE END: How long ago if feels now that the sight of Marcus Rashford bursting forward with the ball at his feet would bring Manchester United supporters to the edge of their seats.
